description_long: This is a large, detached two-story house set within a walled lot, featuring a prominent hip roof and a symmetrical facade. The main building is accompanied by a detached garage and a smaller outbuilding, both with matching roof styles. The front of the house has a covered porch supported by columns, leading to a central entryway. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkways, with patches of green lawn and a low perimeter wall with a gate. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with the upper story featuring paired windows beneath the roof peaks. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on balanced proportions and functional outdoor space.
description: A large, two-story house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and detached garage, all set within a walled lot with paved and grassy areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, central door, symmetrical windows, and attached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side wall, garage extension, and the paved walkway along the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, detached outbuilding, and the rear yard area.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the detached garage, side yard, and the paved driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a single main door
